side_compiler.note: Must use GOTOOLCHAIN=local to prevent toolchain directive override

profiling.note: Compact benchmarks dominate (~59% cum in benchmarkIndexCompact). Hot path is btree iteration + keyIndex.compact.

optimization_backlog.name: cmp-sign-test
optimization_backlog.desc: bytes.Compare(a,b)==-1 uses CMPQ $-1;SETE. Could use TESTL;SETS (< 0 pattern). Saves 0 instructions but TEST is cheaper on some µarch.

optimization_backlog.name: escape-keyindex-put
optimization_backlog.desc: keyIndex.put: append patterns escape to heap. Reducing allocations in Put path.

optimization_backlog.name: findGeneration-inline
optimization_backlog.desc: findGeneration cost=81, budget=80 (1 over). Used in get path. Even if inlined, get is 288 cost so won't cascade. Limited impact.
optimization_backlog.expected_impact: <1% - get path not dominant in compact benchmarks

attempt_log.name: raise-inline-budget-85
attempt_log.detail: findGeneration inlined but no measurable impact.

attempt_log.name: bce-walk-reverse-iteration
attempt_log.detail: Alias analysis limitation - closure could modify slice.

attempt_log.name: raise-budget-120-non-runtime
attempt_log.detail: items[go.shape.*uint8].find became inlineable (cost 119 < budget 120) but concrete type instantiations were already inlined. Shape-based generic not on actual hot path. geomean +0.14% (not significant, p>0.05).

attempt_log.name: prove-strict-subtraction
attempt_log.detail: Enabled strict v<x (when y>0) and v>=1 (when y<x) facts in detectSubRelations. Result: geomean +3.60% SLOWER. IndexGet +6.13% (p=0.005), IndexCompact100000 +7.79% (p=0.021). Likely cause: prover spending more time on additional facts without eliminating any bounds checks in mvcc code. BCE count unchanged (140 remaining). Reverted.

task_substitutions: Tasks 3,4 selected. Task 3: deepened codegen analysis - found cmp-sign-test opportunity, confirmed findGeneration is 1 over budget. Task 4/5: tried prove.go strict subtraction facts - caused regression (+3.6% geomean), reverted.
